title: memecylon subramanii
intro: Memecylon subramanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly found in the Western Ghats of India. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. It is used to treat various health issues, including fever, cold, and sore throat, with its health benefits ranging from immune system boosting to antimicrobial action. Traditionally, the herbal preparation of Memecylon subramanii involves drying and powdering the leaves, which can be used to make teas, decoctions, or capsules for medicinal purposes.
